_meta.task: recon-only: signal definition extraction; no backtest, no project decision
_meta.chain_scope: ethereum only (active LP scan is Ethereum-only; Solana/Base appear in coverage diagnostics but are NOT runtime scan targets)
_meta.note_thresholds: all numeric thresholds below are the committed .env-overridable DEFAULTS in app/config.py; runtime .env was NOT read (forbidden). Live thresholds may differ.

monitored_scope.token_universe: DYNAMIC, not a fixed list. Tokens are whatever the 19 watched addresses + 4 LP pools touch. Observed top tokens in delivery_audit: USDT, WETH, USDC, PEPE, plus long tail.

signals.label_cn: 大额资金转入交易所 (抛压预期)
signals.definition_location: app/pipeline.py:8876-8907 (watch=exchange hot wallet, inbound) and :8983-8990 (watch=non-exchange, counterparty=exchange, outbound)

precise_trigger.primary: event.kind != swap AND watched addr is exchange_hot_wallet AND direction==流入 (into exchange) AND size_bucket==large (>=10000 USD) AND counterparty is external & non-exchange
precise_trigger.secondary_medium: same but size_bucket==medium (1500-10000) AND (counterparty_unknown OR is_stablecoin_flow) -> lower confidence/info
precise_trigger.mirror: non-exchange watched addr sends token TO an exchange-related counterparty (direction==流出) -> also classified exchange_deposit_candidate (pipeline.py:8983)

signals.semantics: asset arriving at a CEX hot wallet => potential sell pressure => price-down prior

signals.precise_trigger: watched exchange hot wallet, direction==流出, external & non-exchange counterparty, size_bucket large (or stablecoin+medium). Mirror: non-exchange addr receiving from exchange.
signals.semantics: asset leaving CEX => accumulation / reduced sell pressure

signals.precise_trigger: large stablecoin leaving exchange hot wallet toward unknown external addr (size_bucket large, is_stable, counterparty_unknown)
signals.semantics: dry powder moving out of CEX before a buy

signals.label_cn: LP 流动性流出 / 移除 (策略档所指 LP大额流出)
signals.precise_trigger: in a monitored Uniswap V2 pool: base_net < 0 AND quote_net < 0 (BOTH sides flow out of the pool) => action=liquidity_removal (i.e. Burn). intent_confidence=0.76.
signals.definition_of_outflow: BOTH token reserves decrease in the same parsed pool event = liquidity removed. NOT a swap (swap = one side in, one side out).
signals.semantics: two-sided pool drain; combined with sell pressure / exchange inflow it was the operator's down-move prior

signals.precise_trigger: pool swap with event.side==卖出 AND consecutive_sell >= max(min_consecutive_count-1, 2). base_net>0 & quote_net<0 in pool (base token flows IN, quote/stable flows OUT).
pool swap with event.side==买入 AND consecutive_buy>=max(min_consecutive_count-1,2). base_net<0 & quote_net>0.
base_net>0 AND quote_net>0 (both sides flow IN) => Mint.
mixed/partial net flow not matching swap/add/remove patterns.

signals.definition_location: thresholds in app/config.py:315-322; phase mapping app/test_lp_sweep_phase_mapping.py
signals.semantics: burst of same-direction same-pool swaps draining one side fast; has continuation vs exhaustion-reversal sub-states. sweep_exhaustion_risk is a HARD blocker.
lending-protocol liquidation flow scored by protocol hit / continuity / resonance / surge bonuses.

signals.precise_trigger: watched smart-money/market-maker addr performs a DEX swap; size & quality gated. Notify only on execution (SMART_MONEY_NOTIFY_EXECUTION_ONLY=True).

signals.label_cn: 邻接地址跟踪 / 下游预警
一般资金转移 (噪声基线)
signals.note: default fallback; ~80% of observed events; mostly filtered at gate (stable_non_swap_filtered).

signal_quality_gate.note: stable_non_swap_filtered was 1250/1758 (71%) of dropped events in the sample window

shadow_opportunity_layer.purpose: research-only sample accumulation, never triggers Telegram

event_to_price_correlation.mechanism: app/outcome_scheduler.py: OUTCOME_WINDOWS = (30, 60, 300) seconds. For each signal, schedules price settlement at +30s/+60s/+300s.
event_to_price_correlation.price_source: OKX perp mark price preferred (OUTCOME_PREFER_OKX_MARK=True, OUTCOME_USE_MARKET_CONTEXT_PRICE=True), Kraken futures secondary
event_to_price_correlation.replay_engine: app/trade_replay.py simulates entry(+5s)/exit(SL 30bps / TP 50bps / max-hold 60s), nets fees(6bps)+slippage(5bps), labels clean_followthrough/bad_entry/absorption_reversal/chop_no_edge
event_to_price_correlation.CRITICAL_CAVEAT: the correlation/outcome/replay MACHINERY exists but produced ZERO real settled samples. Daily report shows outcome_30s/60s/300s_completed_count = 0, candidate=0, verified=0, SQLite outcomes table = 0 rows. No empirically validated event->price edge is recorded anywhere in the repo.
